jobs.title: Application Engineer
jobs.content: <p><strong>Application Engineer</strong></p><p>Markforged is the industrial-additive-manufacturing platform pioneered around the continuous-fiber-composite-3D-printing data model & the industrial-additive-manufacturing segment.</p>

jobs.title: Director of Hardware Engineering
jobs.content: <p>Lead Markforged's hardware engineering function across the Mark Two / X3 / X7 / FX10 / FX20 / Metal X / PX100 platform.</p>
